data.name: Pleasure Thieves
data.detailed_description:
特別版


体验《欢乐大盗特别版》带来的极致快感！进入之前为赞助商独享的额外故事情节，享受老师和女儿的扩展情节。


關於此遊戲


La version française de Pleasure Thieves sera bientôt disponible.
(Relisez pour votre plus grand plaisir, en espérant qu'elle se lise mieux que cette page de la boutique !)


La version chinoise de Joy Thief sera bientôt disponible.
(Relecture, j'espère qu'elle sera mieux lue que cette page !) .


在库姆伦比亚大学（Cumlombia University），一名新闻系学生的生活如过山车般跌宕起伏！热爱生活？嗯，可以说是一帆风顺。但是，当你的室友揭开你的神秘面纱时，你就会忘记这一切--伦比亚的戏剧比肥皂剧还精彩，而你即将成为主角。

课堂暗恋？没错。危险的秘密？再确认一下。在你扮演侦探的过程中，你会发现自己不仅在课堂上，而且在真正发生行动的阴暗角落里，遇到了许多有趣的人物。在 "偷情大盗 "中，你将有机会玩转爱情、揭开谜团，并决定大学的命运。

。

"欢乐大盗特别版》包括 4 集主要内容：
- 第 1 集：新男孩
- 第 2 集：绒球与篮球
- 第 3 集：演出时间！
- 第 4 集：秩序
- 额外内容 埃文斯夫人和她的女儿

成人视觉小说类型游戏中最受好评的游戏之一，其幽默的表现形式向经典联谊会电影致敬。


体验你的决定所带来的力量，因为它们决定了场景的发展。打造自己的道路，深入不同的故事分支，每个分支都会展现出令人难以抗拒的精彩瞬间。有了强大的成就系统，您就可以放心了。在这款游戏中，每一个选择都举足轻重，都会吸引您重温游戏，揭开游戏的神秘面纱。



进入一个充满独特角色的迷人世界，每个角色都拥有自己独特的个性和故事。这些引人入胜的角色将带您进入《欢乐大盗》的境界，唤起您对经典青少年电影中深受喜爱的角色的怀旧之情：怀揣梦想的主角、一心只想泡妞的胖胖朋友、卑鄙的富家子弟、隐藏着秘密的性感聪明女孩，或者一心只想变得更受欢迎的自私啦啦队长。还有更多！

data.short_description: 准备好在这部喜剧成人视觉小说中尽情驰骋吧！扮演一名新闻系学生，探索库姆伦比亚大学的奇妙世界。邂逅美丽的女孩，征服她们的芳心，揭开大学的秘密！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 法文, 德文, 俄文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.6GHz or faster 64-bit CPU
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX® 11 compatible
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 記憶體: 4 MB 記憶體

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OSX 10.10 or better
  • 處理器: Multi-core 1.6 GHz or faster Intel or Apple Silicon
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Pleasure Thieves
data.detailed_description:
Special Edition


Experience the ultimate thrill with "Pleasure Thieves Special Edition"! Dive into the extra storyline previously exclusive to Patrons and enjoy the teacher and daughter extended plot.


About the Game

Dive into the rollercoaster life of a struggling journalism student at Cumlombia University! Love life? Well, let's just say it's been a wild ride. But forget about all that when your snooping roommate unveils a juicy secret—Cumlombia's got more drama than a soap opera, and you're about to be the star..

Classroom crushes? Check. Dangerous secrets? Double-check. As you play detective, you'll find yourself meeting a ton of interesting characters, not just in lectures but also in the shady corners where the real action happens. "Pleasure Thieves" is your chance to juggle love, unravel mysteries, and decide the fate of the university.

"Pleasure Thieves - Special Edition" includes 4 Main Episodes:

- Episode 1: The New Boy

- Episode 2: Pompoms & Basketball

- Episode 3: Showtime!

- Episode 4: The Order

- Extra Content: Mrs. Evans & Her Daughter

One of the most acclaimed games in the adult visual novel genre for its humorous presentation, paying homage to classic sorority movies.

Experience the power of your decisions as they shape the unfolding scenes. Craft your own path and delve into diverse story branches, each unveiling irresistible moments. With a robust Achievement System, rest assured no stone is left unturned. Every choice holds weight in this game, seducing you to revisit and uncover all it has to offer.

Enter a fascinating world filled with unique characters, each possessing their own distinct personalities and stories. These intriguing characters will transport you to the realm of Pleasure Thieves, evoking the same nostalgic feeling as beloved characters from classic teen movies: the protagonist with dreams to accomplish, the chubby friend whose sole focus is getting laid, the despicable rich kid, the sexy, intelligent girl with a hidden secret, or the selfish cheerleader who only thinks about becoming more popular. And many more!

data.short_description: Get ready for a wild ride on this comedy-adult visual novel! Play as a journalism student exploring the intriguing world of Cumlombia University. Meet gorgeous girls, conquer their hearts, and uncover university secrets along the way trying different paths!
data.supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, French, German, Russian

  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
